video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Oakspire (androgynous, guild sash) steadies a damaged metal shield on a workbench while Yuna Brightford (masculine, guild sash) carefully guides a repair tool along the surface. Cooperative teamwork, warm lighting, no sparks, no text, no watermark, cinematic medium shot.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and characters. Yuna Brightford taps the final repair mark on the shield with the tool while Yuna Oakspire holds the shield steady with both hands. Friendly collaborative atmosphere, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark, cinematic medium shot.
video_job.safety_notes: The content depicts a non-sexual, cooperative professional task between two fantasy characters in a safe, well-lit environment. No harmful or inappropriate elements are present.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge has a damaged shield from an apprentice's accident; as fellow quartermasters, they are collaborating to repair it efficiently.
